text:
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_10_12 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Type Code (10th Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the tenth of up to 16 managed care plan type codes: A model of health care 
delivery organized to provide a defined set of services in the month. There are separate variables for 
each of the 12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_10_01 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_10_02 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_10_03
